section.fundamentalsDescription: Core metadata identifying the data contract, including name, version, status, and organizational context.

name.label: Name
name.tooltip: The name of the data contract

id.label: ID
id.tooltip: Unique identifier for this data contract

status.label: Status
status.tooltip: Current status of the data contract

tenant.label: Tenant
tenant.tooltip: Tenant or organization this contract belongs to

domain.label: Domain
domain.tooltip: Business domain or category of this data contract

tags.label: Tags
tags.tooltip: Categorize your data contract with tags

termsOfUse.heading: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.description: High level description of the dataset including purpose, usage guidelines, and limitations.

purpose.label: Purpose
purpose.tooltip: Intended purpose for the provided data
purpose.placeholder: Describe the purpose of this data contract...

usage.label: Usage
usage.tooltip: How this data should be used
usage.placeholder: Describe how to use this data...

limitations.label: Limitations
limitations.tooltip: Technical, compliance, and legal limitations for data use

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this data contract? This action cannot be undone.
